title: Singtel CEO’s Pay Cut 17% to $5.3 Million After Network Outages
title_cn: 网络中断后新加坡电信首席执行官减薪 17% 至 530 万美元
summary: Singapore Telecommunications Ltd. cut Group Chief Executive Officer Yuen Kuan Moon’s pay by 17% after a year marked by emergency service disruption and network outages in Australia and Singapore.

title: Singapore’s DBS Group Completes Debut $1 Billion SRT Transaction
title_cn: 新加坡星展集团完成首次 10 亿美元 SRT 交易
summary: DBS Group Holdings Ltd. said it completed its inaugural significant risk transfer, referencing a $1 billion diversified portfolio of corporate loans, as it seeks to free up capital for growth.

title: Wanda Ordered to Pay Suning $258 Million Over Failed IPO
title_cn: 万达因IPO失败被责令向苏宁支付2.58亿美元
summary: A Chinese court ordered Dalian Wanda Group Co. to pay Suning.Com Co. 1.75 billion yuan ($258 million), settling a years-long dispute over a failed property management initial public offering.

title: States, US Reach Deal With Egg Producers in Cartel Pricing Probe
title_cn: 美国各州与鸡蛋生产商就卡特尔定价调查达成协议
summary: The US Justice Department and a coalition of states have reached a settlement with egg producers over alleged illegal price coordination, according to New York’s attorney general.

title_cn: 莫迪对日本的青睐使银行在交易浪潮中占据优势
summary: In the midst of a 15-month negotiation to secure a foreign backer last year, Indian lender Yes Bank Ltd. was given an informal nod from the nation’s central bank: The Japanese bidder was the preferred choice.

title_cn: 自 IPO 以来，Forgent 及其支持者在价格翻倍后提供股票
summary: Forgent Power Solutions Inc. and its private equity backer Neos Partners LP are offering to sell about 35 million shares, marking the third stock sale since the power distribution equipment maker went public in February.

title_cn: 股市因科技股上涨而收高，美联储库克保住工作等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 4:49

title: China Says Tech Growth a Challenge to Predict Energy Demand
title_cn: 中国称技术增长对预测能源需求构成挑战
summary: China faces greater uncertainty in forecasting energy demand as structural changes in the economy and the rapid expansion of new industries reshape consumption patterns, according to a top government official.

title: Japan’s Two-Year Bond Sale Sees Strong Demand on BOJ Caution
title_cn: 日本两年期债券发行需求强劲，日本央行谨慎行事
summary: Japan’s two-year government bond auction Tuesday saw stronger demand than the 12-month average, reflecting concerns over the Bank of Japan’s policy path.

title: Congo Orders Cobalt Miners to Give Up Unused Export Quotas
title_cn: 刚果命令钴矿商放弃未使用的出口配额
summary: Cobalt miners in the Democratic Republic of Congo will be required to surrender unused export quotas for the first half of the year to a government regulator.

title: RBI Funding Curbs Deal ‘Body Blow’ to Indian Prop Trading Firms
title_cn: 印度储备银行资金限制对印度自营交易公司的交易“沉重打击”
summary: India’s proprietary trading firms and stock brokers are bracing for a major overhaul of how they finance trading activity.

title: Trump Lost the Fed Battle, But Look What He Won
title_cn: 特朗普输掉了美联储之战，但看看他赢得了什么
summary: The Supreme Court cleared his right to fire regulators at will — like in markets, crypto.

title: Morgan Stanley Warns of Oil Glut and Cuts Forecasts on Hormuz
title_cn: 摩根士丹利警告石油过剩并下调霍尔木兹海峡预测
summary: Morgan Stanley cut oil forecasts for the second time in about two weeks as flows through the Strait of Hormuz return faster than expected, while strong US supply and weak Chinese demand raise the risk of a glut.

title: Breitling Owner: China Remains a Complicated Market
title_cn: 百年灵老板：中国仍然是一个复杂的市场
summary: Georges Kern, CEO of House of Brands, says that although the group is gaining market share in China, consumers remain reluctant to invest in luxury goods. He also shares more about the group's expansion plans on "Bloomberg: The China Show." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Tech Rebounds, Traders On Yen Intervention Watch  | The Asia Trade 6/30/2026
title_cn: 美国科技股反弹，交易员关注日元干预|亚洲贸易 6/30/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Tech Growth Makes Energy Demand Harder to Forecast
title_cn: 中国科技的增长使得能源需求更难预测
summary: China faces greater uncertainty in forecasting energy demand as structural changes in the economy and the rapid expansion of new industries reshape consumption patterns, according to a top government official. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Miniso US CEO on Business Growth Strategy
title_cn: 名创优品美国首席执行官谈业务增长战略
summary:
Tom Bartlebaugh, CEO of Miniso USA, discusses his outlook for the Chinese brand's expansion into North America, and its strategy in expanding on lifestyle and apparel products, utilising collaborations and original IP.
He says the company targets 20% in US store growth this year. He speaks exclusively with Haidi Stroud-Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asian Equities Climb as Tech Rebounds, Yen Weakens: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市随着科技股反弹而上涨，日元走弱：市场总结
summary: Asian equities rose, adding to the regional benchmark’s biggest quarterly gain in almost two decades, as technology stocks rallied on optimism over the AI trade. The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986.

title: China PMI Lays Relatively Constructive Picture for June: BofA
title_cn: 美国银行：中国 PMI 为 6 月份提供了相对有建设性的前景
summary: China’s factory and non-manufacturing activity fared better than expected in June. BofA's Helen Qiao says the supply-side factors have been "pretty resilient for some time," but the "question is really on the demand-side - consumption and investment." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Capital Flight Caps Most-Profitable Bank’s Wealth Push
title_cn: 印度尼西亚资本外逃限制了最赚钱银行的财富推动力
summary: Indonesia’s biggest non-state bank said capital flight has hampered efforts to expand its wealth management business, underscoring how an erosion of investor confidence is hindering the private sector in Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

title: Australians' Trust in US Hits Record Low
title_cn: 澳大利亚人对美国的信任度创历史新低
summary: A new Lowy Institute survey points to a significant shift in Australians' views on China, the US alliance, and President Trump. Research Fellow Charles Lyons-Jones joins "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" to unpack the results and their implications for Australia's strategic positioning in the Indo-Pacific. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Drops Below $4,000 as US-Iran Tensions Raise Inflation Risk
title_cn: 美伊紧张局势加剧通胀风险，金价跌破 4,000 美元
summary: Gold extended a decline below $4,000 an ounce as the US and Iran sent conflicting signals ahead of fresh talks to end the war that’s fueled global inflationary pressures.

title: China Broker Stocks Eye Best Month Since October on Trading Boom
title_cn: 中国券商股迎来十月以来最好月度交易热潮
summary: Chinese brokerage stocks are set to close June with their strongest monthly gain in eight months, driven by rising trading activity and IPO issuance that may sustain the rally.

title: Indonesia Biofuel Push Adds Strain to Producers and Palm Markets
title_cn: 印度尼西亚生物燃料的推动给生产商和棕榈市场增加了压力
summary: The rollout of a pioneering palm-diesel blend is set to stretch Indonesian biofuel makers to their limits and tighten global supplies of the tropical oil by diverting it away from export markets.

title: Indonesian Bonds Draw $1.2 Billion as Higher Yields Lure Funds
title_cn: 高收益吸引资金 印尼债券吸金 12 亿美元
summary: Indonesian bonds are on track for their biggest monthly inflow in more than a year, in a sign that government efforts to lift yields to lure foreign investors and support the rupiah are paying off.

title: Yen Hits Four-Decade Low in Historic Slide
title_cn: 日元跌至四个十年新低
summary:
The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market. Bloomberg's Ruth Carson explains the context.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pakistan Buys Emergency LNG Shipment on Disrupted Qatar Exports
title_cn: 巴基斯坦因卡塔尔出口中断而紧急购买液化天然气
summary: Pakistan purchased a liquefied natural gas shipment for prompt delivery this week as tension in the Strait of Hormuz continues to disrupt Qatari exports to the South Asian nation.

title: Oil Set for Quarterly Drop as Morgan Stanley Warns of Glut Risks
title_cn: 摩根士丹利警告过剩风险，油价将出现季度下跌
summary: Oil headed for the biggest quarterly decline since the pandemic as flows through the Strait of Hormuz accelerated following progress on a peace deal, with Morgan Stanley warning of a potential glut.

title: Smuggler Pleads Guilty in $30 Million Scheme to Move Immigrants
title_cn: 走私犯承认 3000 万美元转移移民计划有罪
summary: A criminal network generated up to $30 million from smuggling immigrants across the southern border into the US, according to a statement from the Justice Department.

title: China Clamps Down on Issuance of Higher-Yielding Offshore Debt
title_cn: 中国限制发行高收益离岸债券
summary: Chinese authorities are discouraging firms from raising money offshore at higher yields, in the latest step to clamp down on risks among municipal borrowers shouldering more than $100 billion of overseas bond debt, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Mizuho, SMFG Fuel Record Japanese Corporate Bond Sales Overseas
title_cn: 瑞穗银行和三井住友金融集团推动日本企业债券海外销售创纪录
summary: Mizuho Financial Group Inc. and Sumitomo Mitsui Financial Group Inc. propelled foreign-currency bond sales by Japanese companies to a record for any quarter Monday as the nation’s companies tap deeper overseas markets to finance growth.

title: Yen Hits Four-Decade Low in Historic Slide That’s Rattled Japan
title_cn: 日元跌至四个十年新低，历史性下滑令日本不安
summary: The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market.

title: How Ambani Built Project Jupiter to Launch India’s Biggest IPO
title_cn: 安巴尼如何打造木星项目以发起印度最大的首次公开募股
summary: Last August, Mukesh Ambani promised shareholders that Jio Platforms Ltd. would seek a stock market listing in the first half of 2026.

title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Seeks Up to $3.1 Billion From Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: AirPods 制造商立讯精密寻求在香港上市筹集高达 31 亿美元的资金
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. has started taking investor orders for its Hong Kong listing that may fetch as much as HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion), the city’s biggest share debut so far this year.

title: China Loses Out on AI Boom as Stocks Trail by Most Since ‘01
title_cn: 中国在人工智能繁荣中失利，股市自 01 年以来跌幅最大
summary: After a banner year for Chinese stocks on the back of AI advances, 2026 is not going well.

title: Taiwan Dollar Set to Face Pressure From Record Dividend Payouts
title_cn: 新台币将面临创纪录股息支付的压力
summary: The Taiwan dollar, which is on track for its first quarterly gain in a year, may face renewed pressure as the US currency strengthens and local companies boost dividend payouts to a record.

title: Taiwan Opposition’s $7.5 Billion Plan Stirs Drone Defense Debate
title_cn: 台湾反对派75亿美元计划引发无人机防御争论
summary: Taiwan’s main opposition party outlined plans to develop the drone industry just days after stalling a similar proposal from President Lai Ching-te’s government, amid a debate on unmanned systems with crucial implications for the island’s defense.

title: Taiwan Raids Super Micro in Widening China Chip Smuggling Probe
title_cn: 台湾打击超微扩大中国芯片走私调查
summary: Taiwan government agencies raided the offices of Super Micro Computer Inc. and several of its local affiliates, deepening an investigation into the alleged smuggling of Nvidia Corp. chips into China using the company’s servers.

title: Amazon to Pay $2.25 Million to End US Case Over ID Theft Victims
title_cn: 亚马逊将支付 225 万美元结束美国身份盗窃受害者案件
summary: Amazon.com Inc. agreed to pay $2.25 million to settle US claims that it routinely failed to provide records to help customers who were victims of identity theft.

title: StanChart Former AI Chief Joins Accenture as Southeast Asia Head
title_cn: 渣打银行前人工智能主管加入埃森哲担任东南亚区主管
summary: Standard Chartered Plc’s former global head of AI enablement, David Hardoon, has joined Accenture Plc as managing director and head of advanced AI for Southeast Asia.

title: South Korea to Speed Nuclear Push to Meet Surging Power Demand
title_cn: 韩国将加快核计划以满足不断增长的电力需求
summary: The South Korean government will consider ways to cut atomic power construction times as it looks to ramp up energy supply to meet the demands of artificial intelligence.

title: Tencent Ramps Up Buybacks as Share Rout Wipes Out $309 Billion
title_cn: 腾讯加大回购力度，股价暴跌损失 3090 亿美元
summary: China’s Tencent Holdings Ltd. is ramping up buybacks as its Hong Kong-listed shares struggle to recover from a selloff that’s wiped out about $309 billion in market value since early October.

title: House Passes Online Safety Bill as Senate Eyes Stricter Push
title_cn: 众议院通过在线安全法案，参议院加大力度推动
summary: The House on Monday passed legislation to require new online safety protections for children, a sign of growing momentum in Washington to address a widespread concern among US parents even as the measure sets up a clash with senators seeking stronger safeguards.

title: Amazon Sued by Australian Consumer Watchdog Over Prime Video Ads
title_cn: 亚马逊因 Prime 视频广告被澳大利亚消费者监管机构起诉
summary: Amazon.com Inc. has been sued by Australia’s consumer watchdog for introducing advertising to its Prime Video streaming service and then forcing existing subscribers to pay more to avoid the ads.

title: Exiled Chinese Tycoon Gets 30 Years in Prison for Billion-Dollar Fraud
title_cn: 流亡中国大亨因数十亿美元欺诈被判入狱 30 年
summary: Exiled Chinese tycoon Miles Guo, who promoted himself as a crusader against the communist government in Beijing, was ordered to spend 30 years in a US prison for duping investors out of $1 billion.

title: Comcast’s NBC Spinoff Raises Questions About Businesses’ Future
title_cn: 康卡斯特 (Comcast) 的 NBC 分拆引发了有关企业未来的疑问
summary: Brian Roberts lost out on an opportunity last year to merge NBCUniversal with Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. But the process helped get the chairman and co-chief executive officer of Comcast Corp. thinking about what NBCUniversal would look like on its own.

title: Grid Woes Push UK Clean Power Goal Back Five Years, Report Shows
title_cn: 报告显示，电网问题使英国清洁电力目标推迟五年
summary: The UK will probably miss its clean electricity target by five years because of capacity constraints on its grid and could struggle to deliver on promises to cut household energy bills, according to consultant LCP Delta.

title: Supreme Court Re-Shapes Power of Presidency | The Close 6/29/2026
title_cn: 最高法院重塑总统权力|收盘价 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are PIMCO Head of Short-Term Portfolio Management Jerome Schneider, Former FTC Chair & Commissioner William Kovacic, Seaport Research Partners Senior Analyst David Joyce, LSEG CEO David Schwimmer, JPMorgan Executive Director Global Market Strategist Meera Pandit, Former Fed Governor Betsy Duke, Goldman Sachs Economist Joseph Briggs, Honeywell Aerospace CEO Jim Currier, SW Retail Advisors President & Founder Stacey Widlitz, & VCR Group Founder & CEO David Rodolitz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: LSEG CEO on AI Market Impact, Share Buybacks, Volatility
title_cn: 伦敦证券交易所集团首席执行官谈人工智能市场影响、股票回购和波动性
summary: David Schwimmer, CEO of the London Stock Exchange Group (LSEG), discussed the transformative impact of artificial intelligence on the financial markets. He emphasized that despite a challenging 2025 for shares, AI presents a significant opportunity for LSEG by enhancing the value of its proprietary data, which constitutes over 90% of its dataset. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast Plans to Spin Off NBCUniversal in Strategy Reversal
title_cn: 康卡斯特计划战略逆转，剥离 NBCUniversal
summary: Comcast Corp. plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders.

title: Wealth Managers Vie for Korean Workers Getting Record AI Bonuses
title_cn: 财富管理机构争夺韩国工人获得创纪录的人工智能奖金
summary: South Koreans are getting richer more quickly than anyone else in the world, creating an unprecedented opportunity for the country’s asset managers.

title: Nasdaq 100 Jumps More Than 2% as Dip Buyers Lift Tech Stocks
title_cn: 纳斯达克 100 指数上涨逾 2%，因逢低买家提振科技股
summary: Bargain hunters emerged to pick up beaten-down technology stocks on Monday, helping US stocks rally from last week’s declines.

title: US Equities Poised for Best Quarterly Performance in Six Years
title_cn: 美国股市有望录得六年来最佳季度表现
summary: Meera Pandit, Executive Director of Global Market Strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, joined the program to discuss the strong finish to the quarter for US equities. The segment highlighted that US stock markets are on track to deliver their best quarterly performance in six years, reflecting positive momentum and investor confidence as the quarter closes. She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jana Builds Bigger Stake in Fintech Alkami, Pushes for Sale
title_cn: Jana 增持 Fintech Alkami 股份并推动出售
summary: Activist investor Jana Partners has built a larger stake in Alkami Technology Inc. and is urging the financial technology company to move forward with a sale, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Supreme Court Says Warrant Needed for Phone Location Data
title_cn: 最高法院称手机位置数据需要搜查令
summary: The Supreme Court placed limits on a law enforcement investigative technique that leverages data on cell phone users’ location history to identify people near a crime scene.

title: Pimco Sees Fed on Hold for Rest of Year
title_cn: Pimco预计美联储今年剩余时间将按兵不动
summary: Pimco Head of Short-Term Portfolio Management Jerome Schneider expects the Federal Reserve to not move on interest rates for the rest of this year. He talks about how clients and investors can find growth amid hidden risks on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Comcast Spinoff Will Be 'Value-Surfacing,' Marangi Says
title_cn: 马兰吉表示，康卡斯特的分拆将“体现价值”
summary: Chris Marangi, president and co-CIO of Gabelli Funds, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Comcast plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky, unwinding a strategy that began more than a decade ago after struggling to demonstrate that a cable and media conglomerate would benefit shareholders. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rocket Lab Targets SpaceX's Starlink Dominance in New Deal | Bloomberg Tech 6/29/2026
title_cn: 火箭实验室瞄准 SpaceX 在新政中的星链主导地位彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow speaks with the CEO of Rocket Lab about the company's biggest bet yet: buying Iridium in an $8 billion deal to challenge SpaceX in the orbital economy. Plus, South Korean firms, including Samsung and SK Hynix will spend at least $880 billion on chips and data centers, as the country seeks to maintain its edge in the AI era; and Anthropic wins US approval to restore some access to its Mythos 5 AI model after resolving concerns about the technology's potential threats to national security. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber and Waymo Have Ended Their Robotaxi Tie-Up in Phoenix; Uber to Announce New Partner
title_cn: Uber 和 Waymo 结束了在凤凰城的 Robotaxi 合作；优步宣布新合作伙伴
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. said it has wound down its robotaxi offering with Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo in Phoenix, the latest relationship twist between two companies that simultaneously function as partners and competitors.

title: Comcast’s Big NBCUniversal Shakeup | Open Interest 6/29/2026
title_cn: 康卡斯特 (Comcast) 的 NBCUniversal 重组 |未平仓合约 2026 年 6 月 29 日
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." Comcast is shaking up media, with shares soaring on plans to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky. Tech rebounds as South Korea’s AI spending push lifts chip stocks. Plus, the US . and Iran agree to halt attacks ahead of Doha talks. Tyler Kendall breaks down the Supreme Court’s Fed independence ruling, and Del Monte Corporation CEO Mohammad Abu-Ghazaleh joins Open Interest on the brand’s reunion, supply chains, and pineapple-powered pharma research. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alibaba, Tencent Dropped by DC Lobbyists to Comply With US Curbs
title_cn: 阿里巴巴和腾讯被华盛顿游说者放弃，以遵守美国的限制措施
summary: Washington’s most powerful lobbying firms are rushing to cut ties with Chinese tech giants including Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. as new US restrictions reshape the influence game for many Chinese companies.

title: Hugging Face CEO Weighs In on Anthropic AI Model's 'Dangerous' Label
title_cn: Hugging Face 首席执行官对人类人工智能模型的“危险”标签发表了看法
summary: As government scrutiny over Anthropic's Mythos AI model takes center stage in the public debate over AI's national security concerns, Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says being labeled "too dangerous" may actually be good marketing for frontier AI firms. He joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to explain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bob Iger, Joshua Kushner Discuss NBA Expansion Bid
title_cn: 鲍勃·艾格和约书亚·库什纳讨论 NBA 扩张计划
summary: Former Disney CEO Bob Iger and Thrive Capital founder Joshua Kushner have hired investment bankers and discussed making a bid for the National Basketball Association expansion team in Las Vegas, according to sources. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic's Mythos 5 Gets US Approval for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 获得美国批准更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 AI model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security. Theresa Payton, CEO of Fortalice Solutions and former White House CIO, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss how it shows the US is prioritizing national security while still enabling domestic AI adoption in critical sectors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Buffett Delays Gifts to Gates’ Charity Amid Epstein Review: WSJ
title_cn: 华尔街日报：在爱泼斯坦的批评中，巴菲特推迟了向盖茨慈善机构捐赠的礼物
summary: Warren Buffett has decided to skip his midyear donations to the Gates Foundation for the first time in two decades, as he waits for the results of a review into the organization’s links to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, the Wall Street Journal reported late Monday.

title: EU and China Agree on October Deadline to Reset Trade Ties
title_cn: 欧盟和中国就重启贸易关系的十月最后期限达成一致
summary: The European Union and China set an October deadline to make progress on trade disagreements, as tensions rise between the two economic powers.

title: China Escalates Takaichi Feud, Blacklists More Japan Firms
title_cn: 中国升级高市不和，将更多日本公司列入黑名单
summary: China expanded its export-control offensive against Japan, doubling the number of Japanese entities subject to curbs and deepening a feud with Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s government.

title: EY Staffers Accused of Accessing Australia PM’s Bank Account
title_cn: 安永员工被指控访问澳大利亚总理的银行账户
summary: Two junior hires at consulting firm EY allegedly accessed the bank account of Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese, people familiar with the matter said, a potential criminal development that adds to a series of governance scandals engulfing the sector in recent years.

title: Trump Pauses Duties on Moroccan Fertilizer to Aid Farm Economy
title_cn: 特朗普暂停对摩洛哥化肥征收关税以援助农业经济
summary: President Donald Trump will temporarily lift duties on phosphate fertilizer from Morocco as the administration seeks to aid a struggling farm economy and appease consumer fears over food inflation.

title: Trump Calls Bipartisan Housing Bill 'A Big Yawn' | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/29/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称两党住房法案“大打哈欠”权力平衡：最新版 06/29/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Natasha Sarin, Professor and Co-Founder of the Budget Lab at Yale University, and Jessica Roth, Professor at Cardozo Law School and a former federal prosecutor for the Southern District of New York, discuss the Supreme Court's rulings on President Trump's ability to fire agency heads and whether Lisa Cook can remain in her job at the Federal Reserve. Steven Cook, Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, says the US and Iran remain far apart on key issues - particularly, the Strait of Hormuz and Tehran’s nuclear program. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Convert Marc Andreessen Gets Spot on Pentagon Policy Board
title_cn: 马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen) 加入五角大楼政策委员会
summary: Billionaire venture capitalist Marc Andreessen, the one-time Democratic supporter who switched his allegiance to Donald Trump, got a spot with several other prominent Republican politicians and former officials on a top Pentagon advisory board.

title: Cook: Iran Talks May Go in Circles
title_cn: 库克：伊朗谈判可能陷入困境
summary: Steven Cook, Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations, says the US and Iran remain far apart on key issues - particularly, the Strait of Hormuz and Tehran’s nuclear program. Cook also discusses the Trump administration’s approach to regional diplomacy, and why he is skeptical a Israel-Lebanon agreement will be implemented. He speaks with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Egypt Edges Closer to $1.6 Billion IMF Payout With Initial Deal
title_cn: 埃及首次达成协议，国际货币基金组织付款接近 16 亿美元
summary: The International Monetary Fund and Egypt reached a preliminary deal on the country’s latest program review, putting Cairo on track to unlock more than $1.6 billion in financing.

title: Legal Panel Weighs Cook, Slaughter Rulings
title_cn: 法律小组对厨师、屠宰裁决进行权衡
summary: Natasha Sarin, Professor and Co-Founder of the Budget Lab at Yale University, and Jessica Roth, Professor at Cardozo Law School and a former federal prosecutor for the Southern District of New York, discuss the Supreme Court's rulings on President Trump's ability to fire agency heads and whether Lisa Cook can remain in her job at the Federal Reserve. They also weigh the economic and constitutional stakes of the pending birthright citizenship decision. They speak with Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Machado Vows Return to Venezuela, Alleges Regime Blocked Her
title_cn: 马查多发誓返回委内瑞拉，声称政权阻止了她
summary: Venezuelan opposition leader María Corina Machado is planning an imminent return to her country, a move that would pose the biggest political challenge yet to acting President Delcy Rodríguez as she struggles to manage the country’s deadliest natural disaster in decades.

title: Fujimori Narrowly Wins Peru Vote on Her Fourth Bid
title_cn: 藤森在第四次申办中以微弱优势赢得秘鲁投票
summary: Conservative Keiko Fujimori won Peru’s presidential election by a slim margin in her fourth bid for the highest office in the copper-rich nation.

title: With Lisa Cook Ruling, Supreme Court Shields Fed From Trump
title_cn: 根据丽莎库克的裁决，最高法院保护美联储免受特朗普的影响
summary: The Supreme Court blocked Trump’s bid to remove the Fed’s Lisa Cook for now but expanded his power over other agencies. Hear what the rulings mean for the Fed’s future on the Big Take podcast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Bets on Drones and AI in Contentious Defense Funding Plan
title_cn: 英国在有争议的国防资助计划中押注无人机和人工智能
summary: The UK will seek to transform its aging military into a force fit for modern warfare by investing in drones and artificial intelligence alongside more traditional deterrents such as fighter jets and nuclear weapons.

title: Supreme Court Ruling Fences Off Federal Reserve From Trump
title_cn: 最高法院裁定美联储不受特朗普影响
summary: Justices rule that Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook

title: Iran Ratchets Up Talk of Controlling Hormuz Ahead of New Talks
title_cn: 伊朗在新会谈之前加强控制霍尔木兹的讨论
summary: A top Iranian official reiterated the country’s determination to maintain control over maritime traffic moving through the Strait of Hormuz, raising the stakes ahead of fresh negotiations with the US on ending their war for good.

title: White House Looks to Tap Veteran Trump Advisers as Midterms Loom
title_cn: 随着中期选举的临近，白宫希望聘请特朗普的资深顾问
summary: The White House is temporarily bringing on two longtime advisers to President Donald Trump in an effort to bolster its messaging and operations ahead of midterm elections in which Republicans are facing the prospect of losing control of Congress.

title: Venezuela Quake Toll Hits 1,719, Government Sets Up Shelters
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数已达 1,719 人，政府设立避难所
summary: The death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela on June 24 rose to 1,719, National Assembly head Jorge Rodríguez announced Monday.

title: Supreme Court Expands Trump’s Power to Fire Top Regulators
title_cn: 最高法院扩大特朗普解雇最高监管机构的权力
summary: The Supreme Court has handed President Donald Trump sweeping power to bend much of the federal regulatory state to his will, a major expansion of executive branch influence that will enable him to fire the heads of independent agencies that police markets, protect consumers and enforce workplace rules.

title: Supreme Court Says Fed's Cook Can Stay in Role For Now | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/29/2026
title_cn: 最高法院称美联储库克暂时可以继续留任彭博商业周刊日报 6/29/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Mike McKee and June Grasso break down the Supreme Court's decision to allow Fed governor Lisa Cook to stay in her role while she fights President Trump's efforts to oust her. Then, former Governor of Indiana Eric Holcomb discusses RAISE US, a joint effort with former Rhode Island Governor Gina Raimondo that aims to develop a strategy around AI's impact on the labor market. Plus, Kikoff CEO Cynthia Chen, breaks down how her app helps consumers build credit and improve low credit scores. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Has Housing Bill in Limbo as Congress Sends It for Signing
title_cn: 特朗普的住房法案因国会送交签署而悬而未决
summary: President Donald Trump refused to commit to signing a major bipartisan housing bill, heightening uncertainty surrounding the fate of the legislation.

title: New CDC Leaders Vow to Boost Skeleton Staff Left After DOGE Cuts
title_cn: 新任疾病预防控制中心领导人誓言要增加 DOGE 裁员后留下的骨干人员
summary: New top leaders at the US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention told staff they’re focused on hiring more people, including for senior roles, to alleviate pressure on the agency, according to a recording of a meeting reviewed by Bloomberg News.

title: US Treasury Opens Online Portal for Sanctions Removal Requests
title_cn: 美国财政部开放在线门户以受理取消制裁请求
summary: The US Treasury’s office in charge of sanctions launched an online portal for requests to be removed from blacklists or have penalties lifted.

title: Housing Bill Is So Unimportant Compared To Voter ID Says Trump (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普表示，住房法案与选民身份相比并不重要（问答）
summary: Trump spoke to reporter after signing an Executive Order on the right to repair autos in the Oval Office. He said he was surprised by the Supreme Court's ruling on mail-in ballots and that anything that's not the voter id bill is a 'yawn' to him.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cook Stays, Trump Gains Power | Balance of Power 6/29/2026
title_cn: 库克留任，特朗普掌权权力平衡 6/29/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondent Joe Mathieu discusses the latest developments from the Trump Administration. On today's show, former Acting White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Hicks Evaluation Group CEO Fredrick Hicks and Republican Congresswoman Nicole Malliotakis of New York.  (Source: Bloomberg)
